Stable downloads

Download TableTop Nexus

Public installers are hosted on GitHub Releases. The website reads a generated stable release manifest so the version, checksums, and download buttons stay aligned with the shipped build.

Stable channel only Hosted on GitHub SHA256 checksums
Open GitHub Releases Open stable release page

The stable manifest could not be read, so the site is linking directly to GitHub Releases as a safe fallback.

Fallback

Downloads are still available

The site could not safely load the stable manifest, so it is intentionally falling back to the public GitHub Releases page instead of showing stale or broken download buttons.

View GitHub Releases Open repository

Release details

The release manifest is the single source of truth for version, release date, minimum OS support, and download URLs used by the public website.

The download manifest is temporarily unavailable, so the site is showing the safe fallback path to GitHub Releases.

If you need a build immediately, open the release page directly and verify the attached checksums before installing.

TableTop Nexus

Offline-first board, card, and party games for polished desktop play.

Published by DigiSolUK. Need help? support@tabletopnexus.app
